en.extract:
The Talaud rail (Gymnocrex talaudensis) is a species of bird in the family Rallidae.
It is endemic to the Talaud Islands of Indonesia. Its natural habitats are rivers and swamps. It is threatened by habitat loss.


References


External links
BirdLife Species Factsheet.

[[File:ID_Talaud_islands.PNG | thumb | right | Talaud Islands]]
The '''Talaud rail''' ('''''Gymnocrex talaudensis''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Rallidae]].
It is [[endemic]] to the [[Talaud Islands]] of [[Indonesia]]. Its natural [[habitat]]s are [[river]]s and [[swamp]]s. It is threatened by [[habitat loss]].
